cookieConsent.message: We use cookies and similar technologies for sign-in, preferences, and analytics. By continuing to use this site, you acknowledge this as described in our

user.heading: Your dashboard
user.intro: Hi, {{name}} — jump into any area below.

generate.title: Create a quiz
generate.desc: Turn notes or a file into a quiz with AI.

quizzes.title: My quizzes
quizzes.desc: Edit or take quizzes you already created.

subscription.title: Subscription & points
subscription.desc: Upgrade plan or buy more points.

profile.title: Profile
profile.desc: Update your name, email, or delete your account.

users.title: Users
users.desc: Search users, open details, adjust points.

prompt.title: Generation prompt
prompt.desc: Edit the AI prompt used for quiz generation.

feedback.title: User feedback
feedback.desc: Read bug reports, feature requests, and other messages from users.

tokenSettings.title: Point settings
tokenSettings.desc: Configure point pricing and generation defaults.

quizzes.title: Quizzes
quizzes.desc: Review quiz generation status and failure reasons.

auth.title: Hi Buddy!
auth.passwordResetRequested: If an account with a password exists for this email, check your inbox for a reset link.
auth.passwordResetTokenReady: Reset token generated (development mode). Paste it below.
auth.passwordResetSuccess: Password has been reset. You can now log in.
auth.emailVerifiedSuccess: Your email address has been verified.
auth.emailUnverifiedBanner: Please confirm your email address. Check your inbox for the verification link.
auth.verificationEmailResent: If delivery is configured, a new verification link has been sent.
auth.googleUnavailable: Google sign-in is unavailable: missing VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID

accountDeleted.title: Account deleted
accountDeleted.description: This account was previously deleted. You can restore it with the same Google account or the email and password you used before deletion.
accountDeleted.googleMissingCredential: Google did not return a credential. Try again.

upload.title: Create a quiz from your notes
upload.pageSubtitle: Add a file or paste text — we will pull out the content so you can tune questions and go.
upload.sourcePickerLabel: Choose how to add your source material
upload.dropzoneTitle: Drop your file or click here to browse
upload.dropzoneDragActive: Almost there, buddy, release to upload
upload.dropzoneHint: PDF, plain text (.txt), or photos (JPG, PNG, WebP), up to {{maxMb}} MB. Scanned pages are recognized automatically — it may take a little longer.
upload.dropzoneFileTooLarge: This file is a bit too large — please use one under {{maxMb}} MB.
upload.dropzoneInvalidType: Supported formats: PDF, .txt, or photos (JPG, PNG, WebP).
upload.label: Your text
upload.uploadedTextPlaceholder: Text from your uploaded file appears here…
upload.placeholder: Paste any notes or article text...
upload.textCharLimitTruncated: Extracted text exceeded your plan limit and was trimmed to {{max}} characters.
upload.textCharLimitExceeded: Maximum {{max}} characters for your plan. Remove some text or upgrade to Premium for a higher limit.
upload.advancedPremiumDescription: Tune questions per chunk and see a detailed breakdown before you generate. Available on Premium.
upload.questionsPerChunkRange: Enter a whole number from {{min}} to {{max}}
upload.insufficientTokensHint: Buy more points or shorten the text.

upgradeModal.title: Buy more points
upgradeModal.description: Top up your balance to generate quizzes.

upgradeSubscriptionModal.title: Upgrade Subscription
upgradeSubscriptionModal.description: Upload and save documents without generating a quiz. This feature is available on Premium.

upload.insufficientTokensInline: Not enough points. Required: {{cost}}, your balance: {{balance}}. Buy more points or remove part of the text so the cost fits your balance.
upload.advancedCharCounter: {{chunkCount}} chunks · {{chunkSize}} characters per chunk · {{chars}} characters total · up to {{totalQuestions}} questions for all chunks
upload.questionCountRange: Enter a whole number from {{min}} to {{max}}
upload.uploadDocumentHint: Summarize and save only — generate quizzes later from My Documents.
upload.uploadDocumentPremiumHint: Save materials without generating a quiz. Available on Premium.
upload.uploadDocumentPremiumRequired: Upload document without quiz generation is available on Premium.
upload.insufficientTokensSummarizationInline: Not enough points for summarization. Required: {{cost}}, your balance: {{balance}}. Buy more points or remove part of the text so the cost fits your balance.
upload.extractingText: Extracting text from your file… Scanned pages may take a little longer.
upload.ocrSuccessNotice: Text was recognized from a scan or photo. Review it before generating a quiz.
upload.ocrConfirmDescription: Reading text from a photo uses {{cost}} points. Your balance: {{balance}}.
upload.ocrConfirmDescriptionNoBalance: Reading text from a photo uses {{cost}} points.
upload.ocrConfirmInsufficientTokens: Not enough points for photo recognition. Required: {{cost}}, your balance: {{balance}}.
upload.ocrRemoveWarningDescription: This text was recognized with OCR and is not saved to your account. To keep the summaries, use Upload document before removing the file.
upload.pdfOcrConfirmDescription: {{pagesNeedingOcr}} of {{totalPages}} pages need OCR ({{cost}} points total). Your balance: {{balance}}.
upload.pdfOcrConfirmDescriptionNoBalance: {{pagesNeedingOcr}} of {{totalPages}} pages need OCR ({{cost}} points total).
upload.pdfOcrCancelledPartialNotice: Recognition was cancelled. Partial text from completed pages was kept — review it before generating.
upload.pdfTooManyPages: This PDF has too many pages for your plan. Basic accounts support up to 30 pages; upgrade to Premium for larger books and page selection.
upload.pdfPageSelectDescription: Select up to {{max}} pages from this {{total}}-page PDF. You'll see a text preview for each page.
upload.pdfPageSelectNoPreview: No preview available — this page may need OCR.
upload.pdfPageSelectInvalid: Invalid page selection. Pick between 1 and 10 pages.
upload.textTruncatedNotice: Your file exceeded the plan limit — we kept the first {{max}} characters.
upload.ocrUnavailable: This file looks like a scan or photo, but text recognition is temporarily unavailable. Paste the text manually or try again later.
upload.ocrEmptyText: We could not recognize any text in this file. Try a clearer photo, a text-based PDF, or paste the text manually.
upload.pdfParseFailed: Could not read this PDF. If it is a scan, make sure text recognition is enabled, or paste the text manually.
upload.extractFileRequired: Please choose a file to upload.
upload.extractFileTooLarge: This file exceeds your upload size limit.
upload.networkError: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
upload.temporaryError: Service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
upload.authRequired: Sign in to generate quizzes with points.
upload.insufficientTokensDescription: You do not have enough points for this generation.

billing.title: Billing History
billing.subtitle: View your subscription and latest payment details.
billing.empty: You don't have billing records yet.
billing.checkoutSubtitle: Open Paddle to pay. When you return, this page will show the updated status.
billing.checkoutInProgress: Complete your payment in the secure checkout window.
billing.completePaymentInPaddle: Complete your payment in the checkout window.
billing.checkoutUrlMissing: Checkout link is missing. Start again from My subscription.
billing.paddleNotConfigured: Paddle client token is missing. Add VITE_PADDLE_CLIENT_TOKEN (sandbox: test_...) to your env file and restart the dev server.
billing.checkoutClosed: Checkout was closed before payment completed.
billing.paymentSuccess: Payment successful. Your subscription or points will update shortly.
billing.paymentFailed: Payment failed. You can try again or choose another payment method.
billing.paymentPendingTimeout: Payment is still processing. Refresh this page in a moment or check Billing history.

failureReasons.provider_payment_failed: The payment provider declined this payment.
failureReasons.checkout_closed: Checkout was closed before payment completed.

billing.alreadyProcessed: This checkout session is already processed.

subscription.title: My Subscriptions and Points
subscription.loadFailed: Failed to load subscription and points
subscription.premiumAccessUntil: Premium access until {{date}}. Your plan will switch to Basic after that.
subscription.premiumTokenDiscount: Your Premium plan includes {{percent}}% off point top-ups.
subscription.tokensInvalidAmount: Enter a whole number greater than 0

mySubscription.title: My Subscription
mySubscription.description: Manage your subscription and point usage.
mySubscription.statusDescription: Your current plan is active and ready to use.
mySubscription.nextBillingDateDescription: Your next charge date appears in billing history after checkout.

benefits.saveDocumentOnly: Upload and save documents without generating a quiz
benefits.advancedCustomization: Advanced options on Create Quiz — tune questions per chunk and preview chunk breakdown

tokens.title: Points
tokens.description: Points are used for quiz generation and related actions.

qualification.title: A few quick questions
qualification.description: This helps us understand how you use AI Tutor. You can skip and come back later.
qualification.answerRequired: Pick an option or write a short answer to continue.
qualification.submitFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you requested does not exist or was moved.

admin.userDetailsDeltaInvalid: Delta must be a non-zero integer
admin.userDetailsPremiumEndInvalid: Choose a valid future date and time
admin.promptDescription: Edit the prompt template used for quiz generation.
admin.chunkSummaryPromptDescription: Edit the prompt template used to summarize document chunks before quiz generation.
admin.qualificationDescription: Manage qualification questions shown to users after login.
admin.qualificationHelp: Use JSON array with fields: id, prompt, options (2-10 items).
admin.qualificationResponsesDescription: Answers saved when users complete the onboarding questions. Skips are stored separately.
admin.feedbackDescription: Messages submitted from the in-app feedback form.
admin.feedbackSearchPlaceholder: Search by user, email, or message
admin.generationSettingsDescription: Configure signup bonus points, document chunking, point estimation, and default questions.
admin.signupBonusTokensHint: Granted once when a new user registers (email/password or first Google login). Set to 0 to disable.
admin.quizzesDescription: All quizzes with generation status, owner, and failure details.
admin.quizzesSearchPlaceholder: Quiz ID, user name, or email
admin.tokenAnalyticsDescription: Usage analytics for quiz generations, chunk summarization, and model point consumption in one list.
admin.chunkSizeCharsHint: Maximum characters per document chunk before splitting.
admin.chunkOverlapCharsHint: Shared characters between consecutive chunks. Must be less than chunk size.
admin.tokensPerChunkSummaryHint: Estimated points charged for each AI chunk summarization.
admin.tokensPerOcrImageHint: Points charged when a user recognizes text from an uploaded photo.
admin.questionsPerChunkHint: Default question count scales with the number of document chunks.
